title: Courses Offered at Anna University 2026-27

detail.title: Courses Offered at Anna University 2026-27
detail.short_info: Anna University UG & PG Admission 2026-27 is open. Apply online for M.Sc. and B.E. (Training Integrated) programmes. Check important dates, courses list, and official notification here.

content.text: Anna University UG & PG Admission 2026-27 has started. Online applications are invited for various M.Sc. (2-Year) PG programmes and B.E. (Training Integrated) UG programmes for the academic year 2026-27. Candidates can apply through the official website www.annauniv.edu.

sections.heading: Overview of Anna University UG & PG Admission 2026-27
M.Sc. (2 Year) Degree Programmes (College of Engineering Guindy - CEG)
B.E. (Training Integrated) Programmes (Sponsored by HL Mando Anand India Pvt. Ltd.)
Important Dates for Anna University Admission 2026-27
How to Apply for Anna University UG & PG Admission 2026-27

items: Go to the Centre for Admissions section.
Register and fill the online application form.
Pay the application fee and submit the form.
